description: 100+ real open-source systems for the LocalAIFactory code+docs benchmark

systems.expectedCapability: Full C#/T-SQL/Python symbol extraction (classes/functions/EF or SQL bridge), partial under file cap.
systems.expectedGap: Non-C#/SQL/Python assets (e.g. JavaScript, XML, CSS) not structurally extracted -> UnsupportedLanguage.
